nodes.name: Chirping cisticola
nodes.summary: Chirping cisticola（Cisticola pipiens）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chirping cisticola。

nodes.name: Chirping cisticola
nodes.summary: The chirping cisticola (Cisticola pipiens) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Angola, Botswana, Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Namibia, Tanzania, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland and swamps. Gallery References External links Chirping cisticola - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
